---
title: "1. Active ingredient screening and target prediction"
format: html
---

# Active ingredient screening

## Load packages {-}
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(data.table)
library(openxlsx)

library(future)     
library(furrr)      
library(progressr) 
library(httr)
```

## Load data from TM-MC 2.0

```{r}
rm(list = ls())

tmmc_herb <- openxlsx::read.xlsx("../data/raw/tmmc2/medicinal_material_modify.xlsx")

tmmc_compound <- openxlsx::read.xlsx("../data/raw/tmmc2/medicinal_compound.xlsx")

tmmc_compound_property <- openxlsx::read.xlsx("../data/raw/tmmc2/chemical_property.xlsx")

tmmc_compound_protein <- openxlsx::read.xlsx("../data/raw/tmmc2/chemical_protein.xlsx")

tmmc_protein_disease <- openxlsx::read.xlsx("../data/raw/tmmc2/protein_disease.xlsx")

tmmc_prescription <- openxlsx::read.xlsx("../data/raw/tmmc2/prescription.xlsx")

tmmc_herb_compound <- left_join(tmmc_herb,tmmc_compound,by = "LATIN",relationship = "many-to-many") %>%
  dplyr::select(LATIN,CHINESE,PINYIN,ID,COMPOUND)

save(list = ls(),file = "../data/raw/tmmc2/tmmc.Rdata")
```

### Screening of compounds in Qifu Decoction
```{r}
rm(list = ls())

qfd_tmmc_herb_compound <- tmmc_herb_compound |>
  dplyr::filter(PINYIN %in% c("Fuzi","Huangqi")) |>
  dplyr::filter(ID != 0) |>
  distinct(LATIN,ID,.keep_all = TRUE) |>
  mutate(ID = strsplit(as.character(ID), "\\|") %>% sapply(., function(x) x[1]))
```

## Load data from dcabm-tcm
```{r}
dcabm_herb_compound <- read.xlsx("../data/raw/dcabm/herb20230603.xlsx")

qfd_dcabm_herb_compound <- dcabm_herb_compound |>
  dplyr::filter(Latin.name %in% c("Aconitum carmichaeli","Astragalus membranaceus")) |>
  mutate(across(where(is.character), trimws)) |>
  separate_rows(Blood.consitutents, sep = "\\|") |>
  mutate(
    CID = str_extract(Blood.consitutents, "(?<=Pubchem CID:)[^)]+") %>% str_trim(),
    DCABM.ID = str_extract(Blood.consitutents, "(?<=DCABM ID:)[^)]+") %>% str_trim(),
    temp = str_remove(Blood.consitutents, "\\s+\\(Pubchem CID:[^)]+\\)")
  ) |>
  mutate(
    temp2 = str_remove(temp, "\\([^)]+\\)$") %>% str_trim(),
    Compound = str_remove(temp2, "\\([^)]+\\)$") %>% str_trim(),
    Formula = str_match(temp2, "\\(([^)]+)\\)$")[, 2] %>% str_trim()
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(-Blood.consitutents, -temp, -temp2, -DCABM.ID) |>
  mutate(across(where(is.character), trimws))

save(list = ls(),file = "../data/raw/dcabm/dcabm.Rdata")
```
